title: oliganthes lanuginosa
intro: Oliganthes lanuginosa, also known as woolly daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and act as an antiseptic, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and wounds. The health benefits of Oliganthes lanuginosa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Oliganthes lanuginosa is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
